allow: Bash(find 'C:/Users/leeje/Desktop/클로드 test/주식추천' -type f -name package.json -o -name requirements.txt -o -name pyproject.toml -o -name Makefile -o -name .env -o -name *.config.js -o -name vite.config.* -o -name next.config.*)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8501 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Name ''streamlit'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_ProcessName -like ''*python*'' -and $_CommandLine -like ''*streamlit*'' } -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,''.''\);  import config; print\(''ANTHROPIC_KEY:'', repr\(config.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY[:30] if config.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY else ''EMPTY''\)\); print\(''NEWS_KEY:'', repr\(config.NEWS_API_KEY[:10] if config.NEWS_API_KEY else ''EMPTY''\)\); print\(''GEMINI_KEY:'', repr\(config.GEMINI_API_KEY[:10] if config.GEMINI_API_KEY else ''EMPTY''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; k = os.getenv\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'',''''\) or os.getenv\(''CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN'',''''\); print\(''Current key prefix:'', k[:40] if k else ''NOT FOUND''\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; k = os.getenv\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'',''''\) or os.getenv\(''CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN'',''''\); print\(k\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 7844 | Select-Object Name, CPU, Id, StartTime")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_Name -like ''python*''} | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU")
